narrative: Phishing-credential incident Sev-3. Preparation: runbook current, contact roster verified, tooling operational. Detection and analysis: alert triaged within 8 minutes, scope determined to single user mailbox, severity classified Sev-3. Containment: account isolated, session cookies invalidated, MFA reset. Eradication: malicious OAuth grants revoked, credential rotated. Recovery: account restored from known-good baseline, continued monitoring for 7 days. Notifications: legal informed (no regulatory threshold met — single internal user). Evidence chain of custody preserved. Lessons learned doc completed 9 business days post-incident.
